title: The Price of Bonney’s Freedom
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Bonney, Unknown person #15, Kizaru, Kuma as Kuma’s life, Bonney’s childhood, and the cost of Saturn and the World Government’s cruelty reach their emotional center.
scene: Kuma’s life, Bonney’s childhood, and the cost of Saturn and the World Government’s cruelty reach their emotional center.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A revolutionary placing their hopes on a pirate, eh???

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're backing quite the dark horse... pe pe pe pe pe pe pe pe pe pe pe pe pe pe pe pe!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that unorthodox thinking is proof of your humanity.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Alright... before we begin, remember to push out those memories for my research! A promise is a promise, after all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Does this effectively erase your memories?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, think of it as a copy. It will disappear when it's touched though.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't fret, I've designed a system that will allow me to take peeks without touching it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Okay, it's just another procedure... I have to be clinical about this, I'm a scientist, after all.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wonder how many people have been harmed or troubled by my actions.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: troubled? Living is nothing without trouble, wouldn't you say?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: !!! your life hasn't caused anyone harm or trouble, but your death will pain everyone who loves you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not only for Bonney, but for everyone you've ever met!

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: There's just one last thing, vegapunk...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I can't say how grateful I am...

summary: This part advances the Kuma and Bonney Flashback through 34 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
